name: Pupukea Grill
tagline: Parked across from Banzai Pipeline since 2008 — the surfers lining up here aren't wrong, this is the North Shore's best poke bowl.
parking: Between Pupukea Beach Park and Sharks Cove
talkStory: Started as a roadside food truck across from Banzai Pipeline around 2008, serving surfers coming out of the water. Built a loyal North Shore following for fresh, no-frills poke bowls using fish from Haleiwa harbor boats. The location between Shark's Cove and Pipeline means you're eating with a view of world-class surf. Pro surfers from the WSL circuit eat here during the Triple Crown season. Prices stay reasonable because there's no sit-down overhead — just a truck, a window, and the ocean across the road.
